metadata.title: Michel eduardo | Functional Health
metadata.description: Personalized Functional Health for women 40+, seniors, and families in Canada. More energy, autonomy, and quality of life through sustainable habits.

hero.title: Live with more energy, autonomy, and well-being
hero.subtitle: Functional Health is an integrated approach that cares for your body, mind, and habits — so you live better today and age healthily.
hero.benefit2: Focus on prevention and quality of life

benefits.title: Benefits that transform your routine
benefits.subtitle: Small, consistent changes create big results over time.

energy.title: More energy
energy.description: Regain vitality for daily activities with habits aligned to your body.

autonomy.title: More autonomy
autonomy.description: Maintain independence and confidence to do what matters most to you.

quality.title: Better quality of life
quality.description: Sleep better, move with joy, and feel good at every stage of life.

habits.title: Sustainable habits
habits.description: Build realistic routines you can maintain for the long term.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, welcoming process focused on you.

step1.title: Initial conversation
step1.description: We understand your story, routine, and health goals in a warm, supportive way.

step2.title: Personalized plan
step2.description: We create an integrated plan covering movement, nutrition, sleep, and mental well-being.

step3.title: Ongoing support
step3.description: We adjust together along the way, celebrating every achievement.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Real transformation stories are coming soon.
testimonials.placeholder: Soon you'll be able to read testimonials from clients who transformed their quality of life.

cta.title: Ready to take the first step?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a conversation via WhatsApp. No commitment, full support.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Michel eduardo's story, mission, and Functional Health approach in Canada.
about.title: About me

history.title: My story
history.p1: I'm Michel eduardo, a professional dedicated to Functional Health with a focus on quality of life, prevention, and healthy aging.
history.p2: Throughout my journey, I've supported women over 40, seniors, and families seeking more energy, autonomy, and well-being — not just quick fixes, but a fuller life.
history.p3: My experience taught me that every person has a unique story. That's why my work is to listen, welcome, and build personalized paths.

mission.title: My mission
mission.description: Empower people to care for themselves with awareness, kindness, and consistency — turning knowledge into lasting habits.

vision.title: My vision of Functional Health
vision.description: I believe health is the ability to live with vitality, purpose, and connection. It's not about perfection, but sustainable balance between body, mind, and environment.

differentials.title: What sets me apart
differentials.item3: Focus on prevention and healthy longevity
differentials.item4: Realistic plans adapted to your routine
differentials.item5: Care in Portuguese and English in Canada

education.title: Education
education.placeholder: Space reserved for academic background and certifications.

functionalHealth.metaTitle: Functional Health | What it is and its pillars
functionalHealth.metaDescription: Learn what Functional Health is and how pillars like movement, sleep, nutrition, and more impact your quality of life.
functionalHealth.title: What is Functional Health?
functionalHealth.intro: Functional Health goes beyond treating isolated symptoms. It identifies and balances root causes of imbalance, integrating body, mind, habits, and environment to promote lasting vitality.
functionalHealth.pillarsSubtitle: Each pillar is an essential piece of your well-being puzzle.

movement.title: Movement
movement.description: Physical activity adapted to your reality and life stage.
movement.benefit: More strength, mobility, and confidence in daily life.

sleep.title: Sleep
sleep.description: Quality and regularity of nighttime rest.
sleep.benefit: Recovery, mental clarity, and renewed energy.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.benefit: More vitality and better body function.

mentalHealth.title: Mental Health
mentalHealth.description: Stress management, emotions, and psychological balance.
mentalHealth.benefit: More calm, focus, and emotional resilience.

breathing.title: Breathing
breathing.description: Conscious breathing techniques for nervous system regulation.
breathing.benefit: Reduced anxiety and greater presence in the moment.

spirituality.title: Spirituality
spirituality.description: Connection with values, faith, or inner purpose.
spirituality.benefit: Sense of meaning and inner peace.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Contact with natural environments and sunlight exposure.
nature.benefit: Better mood, immunity, and connection with the world.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: Life direction aligned with your values and dreams.
purpose.benefit: Sustainable motivation to care for yourself.

social.title: Social Ecosystem
social.benefit: More belonging, joy, and emotional support.

programs.metaDescription: Explore Functional Health programs: Vitality 40+, Active Longevity, Healthy Family, and more.
programs.title: Programs
programs.subtitle: Programs designed for different life stages, always with a personalized approach.

vitalidade.title: Vitality 40+
vitalidade.description: A program for women over 40 seeking more energy, hormonal balance, and well-being.
vitalidade.benefits: More energy, restorative sleep, anti-inflammatory nutrition
vitalidade.audience: Women 40+ focused on prevention and quality of life

longevidade.title: Active Longevity
longevidade.description: For seniors and people 60+ who want to maintain autonomy, strength, and independence.
longevidade.audience: Seniors and people 60+ who value independence

familia.title: Healthy Family
familia.description: A program for families who want to build healthy habits together, in a light and sustainable way.
familia.benefits: Family routines, conscious eating, group movement
familia.audience: Families with children, teens, or caregivers

prevencao.title: Integrated Prevention
prevencao.description: A preventive approach for those seeking to avoid chronic disease and age healthily.
prevencao.benefits: Holistic assessment, personalized plan, ongoing support
prevencao.audience: Adults focused on prevention and longevity

assessment.metaDescription: Take a quick self-assessment of your sleep, nutrition, energy, and stress. Get personalized guidance.
assessment.title: Health Self-Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Answer honestly. It takes less than 2 minutes.
assessment.resultExcellent: Congratulations! You're on a good path. Professional guidance can help optimize your results even further.
assessment.resultGood: You have a solid foundation, but there's room for improvement. Let's talk about how to boost your well-being.
assessment.resultFair: Some pillars of your health need attention. Schedule a conversation — together we can create a personalized plan.
assessment.resultPoor: Your health deserves care now. Don't wait — schedule an assessment and take the first step toward better quality of life.
assessment.consent: I agree to the use of my data according to the Privacy Policy.

blog.metaDescription: Articles on Functional Health, sleep, nutrition, exercise after 40, and healthy aging.
blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Educational content to help you take better care of your health.

contact.metaDescription: Contact Michel eduardo. Form, WhatsApp, social media, and business hours.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: I'm here to listen. Choose your preferred way to reach out.
contact.name: Full name
contact.consent: I agree to the processing of my data according to the Privacy Policy and authorize contact.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.

footer.description: Personalized Functional Health so you can live with more energy, autonomy, and well-being in Canada.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our Privacy Policy.

privacy.metaDescription: Michel eduardo Privacy Policy. Learn how your data is collected, used, and protected.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: This Privacy Policy describes how Michel eduardo collects, uses, and protects your personal data, in compliance with LGPD and Canadian data protection laws (PIPEDA). We collect only data necessary for contact and service delivery. You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time via the contact email.

terms.metaDescription: Michel eduardo website Terms of Use. Read the conditions for using content and services.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.content: By using this website, you agree to these Terms of Use. Content is informational and does not replace professional consultation. Michel eduardo reserves the right to update these terms at any time.
